ludeoUESDKPlugin.description: Unreal Engine wrapper plugin for the Ludeo SDK

release.ghDownloadNote: PRIMARY acquisition path. The repo is PRIVATE: anonymous requests against the raw downloadUrl return 404 (not 401/403), which misleadingly looks like the asset is gone. Verify `gh auth status` first; treat a 404 as 'probably auth', not 'probably deleted'. If gh is not installed/authenticated, that is a Phase 0 environment blocker to surface to the human.
release.downloadUrlNote: Browser-only convenience for a human logged into GitHub; does NOT work with curl/anonymous tooling (private repo).
release.note: The release asset is FULLY self-contained: plugin root (.uplugin) + all 3 modules (LudeoSDK, LudeoUESDK, LudeoUESDKEditor) + the C SDK already populated at Source/LudeoSDK/SDK/ with binaries for Win64, Linux, and Android. Extract directly into Plugins/LudeoUESDK and the C SDK step is satisfied in the same download — no separate ludeoCSdk acquisition needed. Prefer this release asset over a GitHub source-archive zip, which would not resolve any LFS-tracked binaries. To find newer versions: `gh release list -R EdgeGamingGG/ludeosdk-unreal-plugin`.

ludeoUESDKPlugin.note: Do not flag engine version compatibility as a risk — the plugin supports UE 4.27 through 5.7. Two acquisition paths: (a) release zip (see `release` above) — single self-contained download, the right choice for Perforce/no-submodule workflows and for git 'download & include'; (b) git submodule of this repo, with the C SDK as a nested submodule (see ludeoCSdk).

ludeoCSdk.description: Native Ludeo C SDK — required by the UE plugin at Source/LudeoSDK/SDK/
ludeoCSdk.note: As of plugin release 4.2.0 the C SDK ships BUNDLED inside the LudeoUESDK release zip (CoreSDK 4.2.0) — already populated at Source/LudeoSDK/SDK/. The ludeo-sdk-releases repo publishes version tags but NO release assets, so there is no standalone C SDK zip endpoint. Only acquire the C SDK separately when using the git-submodule path for the plugin (then add this repo as a nested submodule into Source/LudeoSDK/SDK); for the release-zip path it is already present.
